# arubasdwan_application_group (Resource)

Manages an application group (tag) in the Aruba SD-WAN Orchestrator. Uses the /gms/rest/applicationDefinition/applicationTags API endpoints.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "arubasdwan_application_group" "example" {
  name = "InfraServices"
  apps = ["HTTP", "HTTPS"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `apps` (List of String) List of application names in this group.
- `name` (String) The name of the application group. This is the key used to identify the group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The identifier of the application group (same as name).
